Exhibition Room

Lilies

Trumpet-formed and vivid, the lily rises above its neighbors — white against red and gold, deep blue among white, or scarlet-petaled with pollen-heavy stamens.

No. 7-1
Lilies and Ferns
Nona Dronova · Oil on canvas
No. 7-2
White Lily and Bluebells
Nona Dronova · 2020 · Oil on canvas

Nona Dronova · 2024 · Oil on canvas
No. 7-6
Red Lilies
Nona Dronova · 2017 · Oil on canvas
No. 7-7
Lilies in Sun and Shade
Nona Dronova · 2024 · Oil on canvas
The Garden as Art

A digital archive of artistic heritage, dedicated to the philosophy of the garden, contemporary art, and the creation of a harmonious living space.
